name: Csl Limited
analysis: CSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 56% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$117.6500, stop A$96.8616, target A$140.9800 (1.12:1) — then trail it.
